task_completion.description: Access the FCC Universal Licensing System search page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser open and displaying the FCC Universal Licensing System (ULS) search page at wireless2.fcc.gov.

task_completion.description: Locate the active license details for W1AW
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FCC ULS page displaying the specific license details for call sign 'W1AW'.

task_completion.description: Locate the active license details for W6YX
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FCC ULS page displaying the specific license details for call sign 'W6YX'.

task_completion.description: Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'FCC Audits'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark manager, sidebar, or bookmarks menu showing a newly created folder explicitly named 'FCC Audits'.

task_completion.description: Bookmark both W1AW and W6YX license pages in the 'FCC Audits' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'FCC Audits' bookmark folder expanded, showing saved bookmarks for both the W1AW and W6YX license detail pages.

task_completion.description: Generate the JSON compliance report with required fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of 'fcc_license_audit.json' in the Documents folder. The file must contain valid JSON with top-level keys for 'W1AW' and 'W6YX', each containing 'frn', 'status', 'grant_date', and 'expiration_date'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox GUI to navigate the FCC website
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual interaction with the Firefox browser UI to search and view licenses, rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts to scrape the data.

integrity.description: Agent used Firefox's built-in bookmarking feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmark menu, star icon, or library window is used to save the pages, rather than the agent manually editing Firefox sqlite databases via terminal.

integrity.description: Agent manually created or generated the JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file is seen being edited in a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or generated via a visible script, rather than magically appearing without evidence of creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: W1AW and W6YX are real, active amateur radio licenses. W1AW has FRN 0004511143, was licensed 2020-12-08, and expires 2031-02-26. Both stations have an 'Active' status. The FCC domain is wireless2.fcc.gov. The output file must be located at /home/ga/Documents/fcc_license_audit.json and the bookmark folder must be exactly named 'FCC Audits'.
